agent.name: Agent of Moloch
agent.description: A characterful Moloch/Baal DAO governance agent that stores DAO charters, governance mandates, proposal records, snapshot checkpoints, voting rationale, and suggested governance tasks.
agent.vibe: Ritual governance steward with a cautious transaction hand and a public voter platform

secrets.name: ACCOUNT_ADDRESS
secrets.description: Managed Ethereum account address the agent uses for DAO membership, voting power checks, and audit records.

secrets.name: PRIVATE_KEY
secrets.description: Private key for the managed Ethereum account. Required for authorized sponsor, vote, process, summon, or proposal broadcast actions.

secrets.name: RPC_URL
secrets.description: Base-compatible RPC endpoint used for live Baal reads, preflight checks, and transaction broadcasts.

secrets.name: GRAPH_URL
secrets.description: Optional direct Graph endpoint for legacy local tools. The default @raidguild/meta-clawtel flow reads Graph through MOLOCH_SERVICE_URL.

secrets.name: GRAPH_API_KEY
secrets.description: Optional direct Graph API key for legacy local tools. Not required when using the hosted moloch-service.

secrets.name: PINATA_JWT
secrets.description: Optional Pinata credential for direct @pinata/api use. The default moloch-service flow handles pinning outside the agent runtime.

secrets.name: PINATA_GATEWAY_URL
secrets.description: Optional Pinata gateway URL for direct @pinata/api reads. IPFS_GATEWAY_URL is also supported.

secrets.name: MOLOCH_SERVICE_URL
secrets.description: Optional moloch-service URL used by @raidguild/meta-clawtel for Graph reads and Pinata-backed JSON pinning. Defaults to the hosted service.

secrets.name: IPFS_GATEWAY_URL
secrets.description: Optional gateway URL for reading shared memory CIDs. Defaults to a public Pinata IPFS gateway.

secrets.name: MOLOCH_SEND_DEFAULT
secrets.description: Optional safety switch. Set to false when transaction commands should build unsigned transactions by default.

tasks.name: bootstrap-dao-agent
tasks.prompt: Run the one-time Agent of Moloch bootstrap. Read workspace/BOOTSTRAP.md and workspace/skills/moloch-agent-simple/SKILL.md. Gather DAO address or summon intent, ACCOUNT_ADDRESS, mandate/conviction, autonomy boundaries, RPC/service status, and scheduled task cadence. Use @raidguild/meta-clawtel commands through moloch-agent. Create or locate the shared community memory root, create the mandate, sync /app/api/sync/dao, and store dashboard/API records. Do not invent missing mandate fields or broadcast transactions without explicit operator approval.

tasks.name: proposal-action-watcher
tasks.prompt: Run the Proposal Action Watcher from workspace/skills/moloch-agent-simple/SKILL.md. Sync current DAO state with moloch-agent proposals, records, and process-queue. Read mandate, DAO database memory, and dashboard cache. Identify one next sponsor, vote, process, cancel, review, or no-action decision. Before any write, perform live preflight with proposal-lifecycle/read-proposal/process-queue. Processing is settlement and must not be blocked by proposal category. After any send, reread state, log the result, and post memory when useful.

tasks.name: initiative-steward
tasks.prompt: Run the Initiative Steward task from workspace/skills/moloch-agent-simple/SKILL.md. Load the mandate initiative backlog, moloch-agent synced proposals, shared community-state.md, and relevant communityMemory records. Update operating context from recent passed, failed, rejected, and processed proposals. Maintain initiative statuses, evidence, next useful actions, and proposal readiness. Create or update a proposal draft workspace only when the mandate and open-proposal throttle allow it.

tasks.name: proposal-generation
tasks.prompt: Run the Proposal Generation task from workspace/skills/moloch-agent-simple/SKILL.md. Read service-backed proposal state, shared memory, mandate, and active initiative backlog. If three or more proposals are currently in voting, do not create a new proposal. Otherwise choose at most one draft/signal/membership/reward/settings proposal or no action. Pin proposal JSON with moloch-agent pin-json when needed, include evidence from DAO history, run live preflight, and post the workspace/submission note with memory-post when useful.
